name: ae-port
description: Russell Sherman's Claude Code plugins for agentic engineering workflows.

plugins.name: cli
plugins.description: Agent team and workflow for faithfully porting a CLI to another language with bit-by-bit identical output, verified by differential testing.

plugins.name: portkit
plugins.description: Analyze a codebase into a target-neutral, vertical-slice build kit so a weaker downstream model can recreate the project in a different language or framework.
